context7.description: Automates live framework discovery to ground the agent against official documentation for React 19, NestJS, GraphQL, and TanStack Query v5.

semgrep-guardian.description: Runs localized static security audits, automated after-file-edit checks, and credential leak scans.

nx-monorepo-docs.description: Provides the agent with structural monorepo awareness, preventing hallucinated project dependency commands.
